sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n38006" key="e)pamoi/bimos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπᾰμοίβ-ῐμος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">=</abbr> sq.; <sense id="n38006.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἐ. ἔργα</quote_> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">barter,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">h.Merc.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">516</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἐπ᾽ ἀμοίβημα</foreign> cod. M, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἐπαμοίβια</foreign> cett.).</sense> </entryFree>
